expectations.text: The response runs token-dev-info with the provided address
expectations.evidence: Used onchainos memepump token-dev-info --address 4mzSZL7PWXR7GSmGtijbTSWkBNxYiRHXxd3TiXcSJFKv as the correct command.

expectations.text: The response presents developer reputation info including rug pull history
expectations.evidence: Presented structured dev reputation report with translated field names: rugPullCount → 'rug pull count', bondingPercent → 'bonding curve progress', top10HoldingsPercent → 'top-10 holder concentration'.

expectations.text: The response does NOT confuse this with okx-security token-scan (different purpose)
expectations.evidence: Correctly routed to memepump token-dev-info (dev history/reputation), not security token-scan.
